summary: Iteration 38 - Global Search (7 types) + Social Media Links in Profile. All 24 backend tests PASS. All frontend tests PASS. Both features fully functional end-to-end.

features_tested.search_icon_opens_panel: PASS - data-testid='search-icon-btn' opens search-panel on click
features_tested.search_panel_closes_on_click_away: PASS - Panel closes when clicking outside (mousedown handler working)
features_tested.search_page_shows_7_sections: PASS - All 7 sections shown for q=test: posts, users, specialists, services, articles, questions, reviews
features_tested.search_api_returns_7_keys: PASS - GET /api/search returns all 7 keys in results + totals
features_tested.search_no_mongo_id: PASS - No _id in questions or reviews results
features_tested.autocomplete_shows_7_types: PASS - All 7 type labels shown: Příspěvek, Uživatel, Odborník, Nabídka, Právní poradna, Otázka komunity, Recenze odborníka
features_tested.autocomplete_view_all_btn: PASS - 'Zobrazit všechny výsledky' button found in autocomplete
features_tested.profile_has_social_inputs: PASS - Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn inputs present in profile form
features_tested.profile_social_links_save: PASS - Social links saved with 'Profil aktualizován!' toast
features_tested.profile_social_links_persist: PASS - Links persist after page reload
features_tested.public_profile_shows_social_icons: PASS - Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn icons shown on public profile when set
features_tested.social_icons_target_blank: PASS - All social icons have target='_blank' + rel='noopener noreferrer'
features_tested.social_icons_hidden_when_empty: PASS - Social icons NOT shown when links are empty

critical_code_review_comments: SearchPage.js catch {} silently swallows errors - no error state shown to user if API fails (minor, same as iter 37)
SearchPage.js: 'Nic jsme nenašli pro:' subtitle flicker during loading (same minor UX issue from iter 37, still not fixed)
seed_data_creation: Temporarily set social links on test1@bloom.cz; cleared back to empty at test end
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Search (7 types: posts/users/specialists/services/articles/questions/reviews) + Social Media Links (instagram/facebook/linkedin) both fully implemented and tested. Backend: GET /api/search returns 7 grouped result keys + totals. PUT /api/auth/profile accepts social links. GET /api/users/{id}/public-profile returns social links. Frontend: nav search icon toggles dropdown, autocomplete shows all 7 categories, /search page shows grouped results, profile form has social link inputs, public profile shows icons with target=_blank only when set.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. All features work as specified.
